title: List of ideas for this week
author: Magic-Mike-2023
selftext:
Hi everyone! This is the list of ideas for this wee from my [Cyclical Barbell](https://builder.limex.com/dashboard/104089) strategy.

|Company|Why Picked|Entry Target|Exit (Profit)|Stop Loss|Event to Watch|Expected Impact|
|:-|:-|:-|:-|:-|:-|:-|
|**Oshkosh** (NYSE:OSK)|USPS NGDV fleet ramp-up.|$144.50|$162.00|$138.00|2026 Access segment data.|**Drop:** Soft North American construction.|
|**Shell** (NYSE:SHEL)|Record LNG profit margins.|$84.50|$95.00|$79.00|Middle East peace talks.|**Drop:** Loss of geopolitical risk premium.|
|**Avnet** (NYSE:AVT)|AI & Defense demand in Asia.|$70.00|$82.00|$66.50|Lunar New Year seasonality.|**Drop:** Temporary Q1 revenue dip.|
|**CF Industries** (NYSE:CF)|Nitrogen supply scarcity.|$108.00|$125.00|$102.00|Hormuz route normalization.|**Drop:** Fertilizer price deflation.|
|**B2Gold** (NYSEAMERICAN:BTG)|2026 Gold price peak.|$4.80|$6.50|$4.25|Goose Mine crushing delays.|**Drop:** Continued high AISC costs.|
|**3D Systems** (NYSE:DDD)|U.S. NDDA defense mandates.|$1.95|$3.10|$1.70|Z-Score/Liquidity update.|**Drop:** Financial distress sell-off.|

# Summary of Risks

* **Geopolitical Normalization:** For **Shell** and **CF Industries**, their 2026 price strength is heavily tied to supply disruptions. Any resolution in the Middle East or Eastern Europe would likely cause a "dropdown" as global supply chains stabilize.
* **Transition Year Costs:** **B2Gold** is currently in a high-spending phase. Even with record gold prices, the stock is vulnerable to price drops if production at the Goose or Fekola mines hits further technical snags.
* **High Beta Volatility:** **3D Systems** and **Oshkosh** are particularly sensitive to broader economic sentiment. With DDD’s high Beta (2.52), a general market correction could cause the stock to hit stop-loss levels significantly faster than the blue-chip peers in this list.

I'll post results of these ideas at the end of the week.
